overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy riding a horse through a stormy rural landscape. The rider traverses grassy hills and dirt roads, passes a horse-drawn carriage, and approaches a wooden farmhouse under dark, lightning-filled skies.

events.description: rider moves from grassy terrain onto the dirt road
lightning strike flashes in the dark storm clouds overhead

agents.ego_description: riding a horse down a grassy hillside toward a dirt road overlooking the water

entered.detail: large body of water visible in the valley below under storm clouds
golden tall grass covering the sloping terrain
unpaved trail cutting through the grass toward the water
sparse green trees dotting the distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy hillside overlooking a lake under dark storm clouds. The rider moves from the grass onto a dirt road as lightning flashes in the sky, transitioning from natural terrain to the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road through open prairie with wooden fencing

events.description: bright lightning bolt strikes visible in the dark clouds ahead

agents.ego_description: galloping along the dirt road with wooden fencing running parallel on the right side

entered.detail: weathered wooden post fence lining the right side of the road
tall wooden utility poles with crossbars stretching into the distance

segments.scene_description: Riding along the dirt road through open prairie, the scene features wooden fencing on the right and telegraph poles lining the path. Lightning continues to flash in the stormy sky as the lake remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road with horse-drawn carriage passing

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two horses passes by traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road as a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses traveling in the opposite direction, passing by the rider

entered.detail: wooden wagon with canvas cover pulled by two horses
boulder sitting beside the dirt road

segments.scene_description: The rider encounters a horse-drawn carriage traveling in the opposite direction, which passes by on the right side of the road. The wooden fence falls behind as the open prairie continues with telegraph poles lining the left side.

events.description: large two-story wooden farmhouse comes into view on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: riding toward and passing a large wooden farmhouse with wraparound porch on the left

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with wraparound porch and gabled roof
small outbuilding near the main house

segments.scene_description: The road leads toward a large wooden farmhouse that emerges on the left, with the lake falling out of view behind. The rider passes close to the house and its surrounding outbuildings as the telegraph poles continue alongside the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild, stormy hillside toward a secluded rural homestead. It begins on a wide grassy slope overlooking a lake under dark clouds, moving seamlessly from the natural terrain onto a dirt road as lightning flashes across the sky. As the rider progresses along the trail, the landscape shifts into an open prairie defined by wooden fencing and telegraph poles that line the path. The scene then evolves as a horse-drawn carriage passes in the opposite direction, with the lake receding from view while the prairie stretches onward. Finally, the road leads the camera toward a large wooden farmhouse and its surrounding outbuildings that emerge on the left, bringing the journey to a close beside the rural structures.
